$comment: Blueprint vectorizer benchmark manifest for regression testing
purpose: Permanent regression set for baseline vs refined mode comparison

melody_maker.description: Gibson Melody Maker - fragmented body, page border competition
melody_maker.baseline_expectation: body-like output, may need manual cleanup

santos_hernandez.description: Santos Hernandez Classical - clean single body view

known_issues: unusual aspect ratio may trigger warnings

bailey_archtop.description: Bailey Archtop - f-hole acoustic with complex curves
known_issues: f-holes may be selected as body candidates

evaluation_criteria.body_like_definition: Output resembles instrument body shape, not page border or construction lines
evaluation_criteria.border_like_definition: Output is rectangular, touches 3+ edges, or covers >70% of canvas
evaluation_criteria.acceptable_definition: Would a human say this is roughly as usable as the older B/B+ output?
